title: Oil extends gains on renewed US and Iran attacks
section_path: Oil extends gains on renewed US and Iran attacks
section_path_text: Oil extends gains on renewed US and Iran attacks
summary:
Main
The energy sector rose as the US renewed attacks on Iran. Precious and industrial metals fell as risk appetite weakened. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2026-07-09 111410.png | assets/2026-07-09_oil-extends-gains-on-renewed-us-and-iran-attacks_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_7589b75dccde.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil futures extended earlier gains as tensions in the Middle Easte continue to rise.

children.title: Main
children.summary: The energy sector rose as the US renewed attacks on Iran. Precious and industrial metals fell as risk appetite weakened.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil futures extended earlier gains as tensions in the Middle Easte continue to rise. Following Iranian attacks on vessels in the Strait of Hormuz, the US retaliated, striking more than 80 targets including military assets in Iran.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: The sharp fall in US distillate inventories comes at a critical time of the oil market. Demand in the US rose 1.1mb/d last week to 4.3mb/d.
